Rung.Text: [XIC(signoff_complete) OTL(Pia.Machine.Signoff_Complete) ,XIC(setup_complete) OTL(Pia.Machine.Setup_Complete) ,XIC(ppc_complete) OTL(Pia.Machine.PPC_Complete) ,XIC(sob_complete) OTL(Pia.Machine.SOB_Complete) ,XIC(matlarrived_complete) OTL(Pia.Machine.MatlArrived_Complete) ,XIC(closeassy_complete) OTL(Pia.Machine.CloseAssy_Complete) ];
